scenarios.docBefore:
# Project Overview

## Introduction

This project aims to build a better markdown editor.

## Goals

- Ship version 1 by Q3
- Achieve 100 daily active users
- Support three AI providers
scenarios.docAfter:
# Project Overview
## Introduction

This project aims to build a better markdown editor.

## Summary
This project focuses on evaluating test scenarios related to a specific system or evaluation process.
## Goals

- Ship version 1 by Q3
- Achieve 100 daily active users
- Support three AI providers

scenarios.docBefore:
# Product Roadmap

## Q1 Goals



## Q2 Goals
scenarios.docAfter:
# Product Roadmap
## Q1 Goals
* Improve API response times by 20%.
* Optimize database queries for faster data retrieval.
* Reduce application latency during peak load by 15%.
## Q2 Goals
* Implement real-time analytics dashboard.
* Introduce user profile customization options.
* Develop and launch a new mobile application version.
